{/* Header */}

Flow Design System

v1.0 Next.js 16 React 19 Tailwind 4

Documentazione interattiva del design system di Flow — un'applicazione canvas-based per il visual thinking con AI.

{/* Architecture */}

Architettura

{[ ["Framework", "Next.js 16 + React 19", "App Router, Server Components"], ["Styling", "Tailwind CSS v4", "OKLCH color space, CSS variables"], ["Primitivi UI", "@base-ui/react", "Headless, accessibili"], ["Varianti", "class-variance-authority", "Type-safe variant system"], ["Tema", "next-themes", "Dark/Light con classe .dark"], ["Canvas", "@xyflow/react", "Node graph editing"], ["Icone", "lucide-react", "Consistent icon set"], ].map(([layer, tech, detail]) => ( ))}
Layer Tecnologia Dettagli
{layer} {tech} {detail}
{/* Navigation Guide */}

Come navigare

Foundations

Building blocks: colori, tipografia, spacing, border radius e icone.

Design Tokens

Pattern di alto livello: glass morphism e colori dei nodi canvas.

Components

Tutti i componenti UI con varianti interattive, stati e composizioni.

{/* Design Principles */}

Principi di design

{[ { title: "Neutralita cromatica", desc: "Palette basata su grigi OKLCH. Il colore e riservato a stati semantici e accenti dei nodi canvas.", }, { title: "Glass morphism", desc: "Toolbar e overlay utilizzano trasparenza + backdrop-blur per creare profondita senza appesantire.", }, { title: "Dark-first", desc: "Il tema scuro e il default. Il light mode e supportato con mapping completo dei token.", }, { title: "Accessibilita", desc: "Componenti costruiti su primitive headless (@base-ui/react) con ARIA attributes nativi.", }, { title: "Consistenza tipografica", desc: "Un solo font (Satoshi) per sans e heading, Geist Mono per il codice.", }, ].map((p, i) => (
{i + 1}

{p.title}

{p.desc}

))}

components-dropdownmenu.name: DropdownMenu

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger render={<Button variant="outline">Menu</Button>} />
    <DropdownMenuContent>
      <DropdownMenuLabel>Il mio account</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuGroup>
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          <User />
          Profilo
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>Ctrl+P</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          <Settings />
          Impostazioni
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>Ctrl+,</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          <HelpCircle />
          Aiuto
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuGroup>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">
        <LogOut />
        Esci
      </DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);

stories.name: Checkbox Items
stories.snippet:
const WithCheckbox = () => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger render={<Button variant="outline">Preferenze vista</Button>} />
    <DropdownMenuContent>
      <DropdownMenuLabel>Visualizzazione</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem checked>
        <FileText />
        Mostra griglia
      </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
      <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem checked={false}>
        <Palette />
        Minimap
      </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
      <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem checked>
        <Sun />
        Snap to grid
      </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);

stories.name: App Header (Pattern)
stories.snippet:
const AppHeaderPattern = () => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger
      render={
        <button className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">
          MR
        </button>
      }
    />
    <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
      <DropdownMenuLabel>Mirko</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <Sun />
        Tema chiaro
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <Moon />
        Tema scuro
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <Settings />
        Impostazioni
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <HelpCircle />
        Aiuto & Feedback
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">
        <Trash2 />
        Cancella canvas
      </DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);
